TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Hbun, title = Hbun, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hbun} }

S.FORM: Hbun Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Hbun a niyaro', 69 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 180 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 64% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 116 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 36% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 64 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 62%, roma 3%.
S.PHON: ńßb~b~vo~u~un itiniaj i fo~u~uxiŇč ¶…ôn no~u tao~ujo~u~uan ko~u ńßb~b~vo~u~un a nijaro~u °, ** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ **%, ro~uma *%.
S.FORM: Hbun Itiniay i Fuxing Cen no Taoyuan ko Hbun a niyaro', 69 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 180 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 64% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 116 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 36% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 64 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal 62%, roma 3%.
